obstruction: The COLLECTION. tools needed to become a usable control system without breaking the existing preview window, menu hover behavior, or devlog workflow.
solutionChoice: Turn the COLLECTION. letters into individual tool buttons, keep each tool isolated inside the preview window, and extend the changelog JSON so future updates can track both task output and time spent.

Fixed menu hover previews so selected COLLECTION. tools return after hover ends
Adjusted main menu button hitboxes to match the visible text area
Added timed devlog fields for start time, end time, duration, obstruction, and solution choice

obstruction: The new tools needed more practical testing controls and clearer interface feedback before the session could be closed cleanly.
solutionChoice: Polish the small interaction problems directly in the existing UI language, then record the finished work in both the JSON devlog and calendar schedule.
